_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and review intelligence guidance for integration into supporting cyber operations planning and execution.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI governance framework components, including AI system registries, tiered review processes, impact assessment methodologies, and post-deployment monitoring requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.512), DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.511).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.533). Shared vocabulary: [review]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, develop, execution, guidance, integration, intelligence] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, components, deployment, framework, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.871, R=0.855). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Develop and review intelligence guidance for integration into supporting cyber o" and "Knowledge of AI governance framework components, including AI system registries," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.513 ≈ STS 0.533 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [review] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [review]. DCWF-only: [cyber, develop, execution, guidance, integration, intelligence]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, components, deployment, framework, governance].
